game_info.title: The White Door - A Mental Facility Adventure
game_info.concept:
Enter The White Door and discover Rusty Lake’s universe in a new game with a unique style! Explore Robert Hill’s dreams and help him to find his lost memories. Can you survive the strict daily routine and bring back color to Robert's life?

The Past Within - A Rusty Lake co-op Adventure


About the Game

Robert Hill wakes up in a Mental Health facility and suffers from severe memory loss. Follow the facility’s strict daily routine, explore his dreams and help him recall his memories.



The White Door is a new point-and-click adventure developed by the creators of the Cube Escape & Rusty Lake series.

Features:

■ Pick-up-and-play
Easy to start but hard to put down

■ Interactive storyline
Follow a daily routine and recollect memories in a playful way, filled with brain teasers and riddles

■ A unique Rusty Lake split-screen adventure
Experience Robert Hill's stay in Rusty Lake's Mental Health facility with an innovative split-screen gameplay

■ Absorbing atmosphere
Each day in the facility has its own atmosphere, suspense and a variety of unexpected and surrealistic events

■ Immersive and haunting soundtrack
Atmospheric theme songs composed by Victor Butzelaar

■ Special achievements
The White Door has more secrets to unravel
game_info.description: Enter The White Door, a psychological point-and-click adventure where you guide Robert Hill through his stay at a mental health facility. Navigate through a strict daily routine split between the monotone reality of the facility and the vibrant world of Robert's dreams. Complete daily tasks, solve puzzles, and help Robert recover his lost memories by bringing color back to his grayscale world. Each successfully completed routine task restores a fragment of color to the environment, ultimately revealing the path to freedom.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate through rooms and interact with objects
Space: Activate/complete current task or puzzle
Z: Examine/interact with highlighted objects
Shift: Skip task animation (hold)
Enter: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart from game over screen

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic navigation and task completion mechanics. This test verifies that the player can move between different areas of the facility, interact with objects, and complete simple daily routine tasks like waking up, eating, and basic hygiene activities.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The AI will systematically move through each room in the facility, attempting to interact with all available objects. It will complete tasks in sequence: wake up, bathroom routine, breakfast, and recreation activities. The AI prioritizes tasks that are currently active based on the daily schedule.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test is successful if the AI can complete at least 3 consecutive daily routine tasks without getting stuck, the game progresses to the next time period, and no collision or interaction errors occur. Progress should be visible through UI updates showing completed tasks.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing the optimal path to win condition by completing all daily tasks and unlocking all memory fragments. This validates that the game can be completed from start to finish, all color restoration mechanics work correctly, and the win condition triggers properly.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The AI follows an optimized strategy to complete all routine tasks in the most efficient order. It prioritizes tasks that unlock memory fragments and restore color. When dream sequences appear, it solves puzzles by analyzing patterns and relationships. The AI aims to complete all 7 days of routine to trigger the win condition.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test succeeds when the AI completes all daily tasks across multiple days, restores all color fragments to the environment, unlocks all memory pieces, and reaches the game win state (GAME_OVER_WIN). The entire facility should transition from grayscale to full color, and the white door should open.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing puzzle-solving mechanics in dream sequences. This validates that pattern recognition puzzles, memory matching, and abstract thinking challenges work correctly and can be solved programmatically.
TEST_3.strategy_description: When entering dream sequences, the AI analyzes puzzle patterns and applies logical deduction. For memory puzzles, it tracks previously shown sequences. For pattern puzzles, it identifies relationships between symbols. The AI attempts each puzzle multiple times if needed to find the solution.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The test passes if the AI successfully solves at least 2 different types of puzzles within dream sequences, returns to reality with progress saved, and the memory fragments are correctly added to the collection. No softlocks should occur during puzzle attempts.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing color restoration mechanics and progressive environment changes. Verifies that as tasks are completed, the visual environment transitions from grayscale to color correctly and smoothly.
TEST_4.strategy_description: The AI completes tasks in various orders to test if color restoration is consistent regardless of task sequence. It tracks the color saturation level of different objects and areas, ensuring each completed task increases overall color in the environment.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Success is achieved when color restoration progresses smoothly with each completed task, no visual glitches occur during transitions, and the final state shows a fully colored environment. The color percentage should reach 100% when all tasks are complete.
TEST_4.description: Testing color restoration mechanics and progressive environment changes. Verifies that as tasks are completed, the visual environment transitions from grayscale to color correctly and smoothly.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing split-screen mechanics and simultaneous reality-dream navigation. Validates that the innovative split-screen gameplay works without conflicts or rendering issues.
TEST_5.strategy_description: During split-screen segments, the AI alternates actions between the reality side (left) and dream side (right). It tests whether actions in one screen affect the other, and whether puzzle solutions require coordination between both screens.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: The test succeeds if split-screen rendering works without overlap, actions in each screen are independent yet interconnected where designed, and the AI can solve split-screen puzzles that require understanding both perspectives simultaneously.
TEST_5.description: Testing split-screen mechanics and simultaneous reality-dream navigation. Validates that the innovative split-screen gameplay works without conflicts or rendering issues.
TEST_5.strategy: During split-screen segments, the AI alternates actions between the reality side (left) and dream side (right). It tests whether actions in one screen affect the other, and whether puzzle solutions require coordination between both screens.
TEST_5.expected: The test succeeds if split-screen rendering works without overlap, actions in each screen are independent yet interconnected where designed, and the AI can solve split-screen puzzles that require understanding both perspectives simultaneously.

TEST_6.test_description: Testing edge cases and failure states. Verifies that attempting tasks in wrong order, interacting with locked objects, and other edge cases are handled gracefully without crashes.
TEST_6.strategy_description: The AI deliberately attempts actions out of sequence, tries to interact with inaccessible objects, and tests boundary conditions. It attempts to enter locked areas, skip required tasks, and interact with objects before prerequisites are met.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: The test passes if all edge cases are handled with appropriate feedback, no crashes occur, the game provides hints when tasks are attempted out of order, and the player cannot soft-lock the game through unexpected actions.
TEST_6.description: Testing edge cases and failure states. Verifies that attempting tasks in wrong order, interacting with locked objects, and other edge cases are handled gracefully without crashes.

TEST_7.test_description: Testing full playthrough speed and optimization. Measures how efficiently the game can be completed and validates that all systems work correctly during extended play sessions.
TEST_7.strategy_description: The AI executes a complete playthrough using the most optimal strategy, minimizing time between tasks, solving puzzles on first attempt when possible, and taking the shortest paths through the facility. It aims to complete the game in the minimum number of frames.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Success is measured by completing the entire game without errors, achieving the win state, and maintaining stable performance throughout. The AI should complete all 7 days in under 5000 frames (approximately 83 seconds at 60 FPS).
